creator: marco.broeder@posteo.eu
text:
On Tue May 25 2010 22:09:56 c-s@c-s.li wrote:
> Could you still please add the second MASTER_SITE link that
> I provided?

It would be very nice to add another mirror!

But I am not sure if it is true for this special link. I tested it.

It only works for one specific version (0.6.0), not in general for all 
different versions. I do not want to change mirror links with every
new update. It should work automatically for every ${PORTVERSION}, so
no manually change would be required.

Do you know another mirror link that meets this condition?

And how did you find the link you provided? I could not find it the
usual ways.

Thanks!

-- 
Regards
